blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraint requirement.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the foreign key constraint requirement.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of copying settings from one business to another, but there is no evidence provided that explicitly checks for the foreign key constraints related to ownership. The existing evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as user sign-ups and booking confirmations, but does not address the specific requirement of validating the foreign key relationship. Therefore, the step cannot be conclusively evaluated.
